heading: Vibe Coding.|*A working introduction.*
lede: A hands-on path from describing what you want to shipping working software with an AI agent — in VS Code and Antigravity. Built for Cambio teams, no deep coding background required.
brandmark_svg: <svg width="26" height="22" viewBox="0 0 26 22" fill="none"><path d="M3 17 L8 12 L13 14 L18 7 L23 4" stroke="#A8BDB6" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none" opacity="0.7"/><circle cx="3" cy="17" r="1.6" fill="#6F7F6A"/><circle cx="8" cy="12" r="1.6" fill="#6F7F6A"/><circle cx="13" cy="14" r="1.6" fill="#A8BDB6"/><circle cx="18" cy="7" r="1.6" fill="#6F7F6A"/><circle cx="23" cy="4" r="1.6" fill="#6F7F6A"/></svg>
footer: Cambio · Vibe Coding intro · static decks, swipe or arrow-key to navigate
